name: Nouc Cham
recipeIngredient: 1 fresh hot chili pepper (about 1 1/2-inch), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the garlic and chili.
2. Squeeze in the lime and use a small knife to remove some of the pulp.
3. Add the fish sauce and water. Mix well.
4. Place in a nice bowl and set aside.
Yield: about 3/4 cup
